name: TechnoRunner
short_description: An indie Arcade Game mixing Rythm Game and Endless Runner, based on techno music with procedural generation. How fast can you go? How high can you score? Find out now!
detailed_description:
TechnoRunner is an indie Arcade game, mixing Rythm game and Endless Runner, set in procedurally generated levels. Compete on a global leaderboard or against your friends for the highest score!

The music sets the pace! Move in the rythm, and take as many risks as possible to unlock combo chains.

The walls are procedurally generated, increasing difficulty with time. Can you reach the end of a song?

The game was carefully crafted by a solo indie developer. And he hopes you like it!

Also available for FREE on Android : search "TechnoRunner" on Google Play Store.

Made in Unreal Engine 5
